data.title: Automotive Refinish Coatings Market expected to reach $13.85 billion by 2030, with CAGR of 3.68%, as per MarketsandMarkets™ study.
data.description: The Automotive Refinish Coatings Market is expected to increase in value from USD 11.12 billion in 2024 to USD 13.85 billion by 2030, showing a growth rate of 3.68%. The rise is attributed to the demand for a fresh appearance in the used car market, prompting sellers to utilize refinish coatings for cosmetic improvements. Factors like certified pre-owned programs and digital selling platforms contribute to this trend. Key players in the market include companies like 3M, Tesa SE, and Avery Dennison Corporation. The study highlights the importance of high-performance coatings for used car dealerships, driven by consumer demands for quality and visually appealing vehicles. The basecoat segment is expected to show significant growth, with acrylic coatings being popular in the market. The article on Benzinga.com provides a comprehensive overview of the market's drivers, opportunities, and challenges.

data.title: Harbour BioMed appoints Yajie Li as Chief Medical Officer in three locations.
data.description: On August 24, 2025, Harbour BioMed, a leading biopharmaceutical company headquartered in Cambridge, Mass., with offices in Rotterdam, Netherlands and Shanghai, shared that it is listed as HKEX: 02142. The company specializes in creating innovative antibody therapeutics for immunology and oncology. The announcement highlights their dedication to developing groundbreaking treatments in these fields.
